revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-225

A frequency band, the bandwidth of which is the maximum bandwidth of a sound for which its threshold of audibility (in the presence of a uniform masking noise) and its equivalent loudness remain independent of the spectral distribution of sound intensity within the frequency group.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Frequency group}}
